species: PRDM1, encoding a transcription factor (TF), regulates plasma cell and CD8+ T-cell terminal differentiation and Th2 lineage specification, while its role in human NK-cell differentiation and homeostasis is largely unknown.
cell_type: PRDM1 regulates primary human NK-cell differentiation and activation
disease_state: The loss of PRDM1 activity is frequent in NK-cell malignancies which may lead to decreased homeostatic control...
sample_source: NK-cells were isolated from healthy donors...
cell_line: using a modified K562 cell line expressing membrane-bound IL-21, 4-1BBL, and CD86 (feeder cells)
